Author: rhysc.
Content: Hello, I have just recently found out about wafer.space through the process of searching for ways to complete a tapeout as part of a masters project. The wafer.space group seems to fit my needs of obtaining the raw dies at a lower cost. I was wondering if there is any idea of when the second run is planned to occur, as I am trying to plan out a timeline for the project and want to see if it will be feasible to work with the team here. Thanks!

Author: mole99
Content:
Hello, afaik the tapeout deadline for run 2 is planned for around June. However, this may depend on when the chips of run 1 actually leave the fab.

@Tim 'mithro' Ansell may be able to give you a more definitive answer.

Author: mithro_
Content: Yeah, it's looking like June - but still TBD.
